testcase.name: nav_scenario
testcase.failure: -^- nav_scenario [✕] -- child finished before timeout triggered {-} nav_scenario [✕] /_/ parallel [✕] --> capture_screen [-] -- Capturing screen... {-} serial [✕] --> floorplan_generator.generate_gazebo_world --> ros_launch --> wait_for_sim /_/ parallel [✕] -^- repeat [-] -- running [status: 7 success from -1] {-} serial [-] --> wait 1s [-] -- still running --> check_process_running {-} serial [✕] {-} spawn_multiple --> spawn_multiple --> spawn_multiple --> spawn_multiple --> spawn_multiple --> differential_drive_robot.init_nav2 --> bag_record --> differential_drive_robot.nav_through_poses [✕] -- Goal aborted. --> emit end
